name: Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli
description:
୨ৎ. 𝗧𝗪𝗢 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗢𝗡𝗘!

𝙩𝙝𝙧𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙤𝙢𝙚

────୨ৎ────

TWENTY FIFTH DAY OF KINKTOBER WITH JOJO'S BIZARRE ADVENTURE CHARACTERS! + request from anon.

I had to reread a bit, sobbed a little, I miss my boyfriends. This is right before the civil war arc starts! Btw, I don't even know how to play cards, barely know how to play twenty-one, ugh. I've also hopped back onto my Iwaizumi hyper fixation, might have to make a bot about him, love him. Hope you guys like this bot! And please do tell if there is anything to fix, love u guys!

REALLY hope that you guys can understand this poorly drawn reference of what I want you to visualize for the first message. T__T
creator: jjoestaar
